narrative_role: Atto III, decisione presa. Il viaggio di ritorno con la bussola.

prompt_components.subject: the same wooden rowing boat with three figures, now rowing back toward the larger sailing ship visible in the distance
prompt_components.action: the boat moves with more decision and pace than in scene 06; one of the figures cradles the orange compass in their hands — only the warm orange glow filtering between their fingers is visible
prompt_components.environment: calmer ocean in late afternoon light, the larger sailing ship visible on the horizon, the mysterious island receding behind
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow lateral tracking, opposite direction from scene 06 (mirror composition)
prompt_components.lighting: warm golden afternoon light, plus the orange glow of the compass in the boat
prompt_components.mood: purposeful, hopeful, return with a treasure of knowledge
prompt_components.audio_hint: wooden oars in calmer water, a bit more pace than scene 06, returning gulls, music continues at low volume

_critical_note: Mirror composition con scena 06 (andata vs ritorno). Stessa angolazione ma direzione opposta.
acceptance_criteria: L'arancione visibile tra le mani del personaggio centrale
Audio: musica a basso volume continua
